title: taraxacum amplexum
intro: Taraxacum amplexum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae, and is commonly known as the sticky dandelion due to its sticky leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum amplexum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum amplexum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
